name: no-slop
description: Technical-writing skill and deterministic checker for machine-prose tells and evidence-light copy.

interface.shortDescription: Tighten technical writing and remove machine tells.
interface.longDescription: Technical writing skill built on evidence-over-adjectives rules, plus a deterministic sloplint checker and a voice extractor that turns real samples into a personal voice skill.
defaultPrompt: Run a sloplint pass on this draft.
Tighten this README in my voice.
